title: 只能选择拍照和截屏的图片，无法选择其他文件夹里面的图片，请求支持
author: monklamn
body:
手机小米15，Android 15

只能选择拍照和截屏的图片，无法选择其他文件夹里面的图片，请求支持

title: fastlane issue
author: IzzySoft
body:
our quality checker reports:

* build/me.rosuh.easywatermark/metadata/es/full_description.txt has 4103 chars
* build/me.rosuh.easywatermark/metadata/fr-FR/full_description.txt has 4346 chars
* build/me.rosuh.easywatermark/metadata/it/full_description.txt has 4129 chars
* build/me.rosuh.easywatermark/metadata/nl-NL/full_description.txt has 4108 chars
* build/me.rosuh.easywatermark/metadata/ru/full_description.txt has 4334 chars

fulldesc is limited to 4,000 chars, by fastlane specs, and truncated at exactly that position (even mid-word). Take into account that some HTML tags are added on import, can you please ensure to stay below ~3,800 chars there? Thanks in advance!

PS: I see you use Weblate. Weblate allows you to set "hard limits" on character count – which should help you at this point.

title: 软件不跟随相册排序
author: ZW-KJ
body:
手机相册设置的是最新照片在下方的排序方式![Screenshot_2025-11-26-01-44-01-77_99c04817c0de5652397fc8b56c3b3817.jpg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a12df00a-cafa-4088-a179-9225bca4c9ab)
打开软件选择照片时优先显示最早的照片![Screenshot_2025-11-26-01-44-28-48_a9115f8cac4114c47b56b49ca93f3358.jpg](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/4fecf69d-45eb-4ac6-bd37-08b3501a3a1d)

title: [建议]添加水印交错的设置项
author: inonno
body: 添加水印交错的设置，使上下相邻的水印横纵不对齐。

title: [建议]为水印设置添加常驻的数值显示
author: inonno
body: 为水印设置添加常驻的数值显示，方便使用者无需调控横条就能看到如角度和间隔的参数。如果可以，希望进一步添加键入框，方便直接精确修改参数。

title: Fullscreen view prevents use

The 3 buttons in top right corner are untappable as they're hidden behind android status bar

title: Symbol: image not being imported
author: mpek
body:
Wonder why I cannot load a photo as a symbol to use it as watermark. The message says Keine Auswahl, which says in German: Nothing chosen. 
But surely chosen a pic. 

That phone is with MIUI Global 12.5.1 / Android 11.
Easy Watermark 2.9.6.

Not sure whether this is a rights issue or a bug? Could you please help figuring out?

title: Parts of the app are covering the navigation buttons
author: Artem13327

title: Save preset feature
author: Dret42
body:
Hi,

I wolud like to suggest a simple new feature: the possibility to save a "presets" to futher use.

In this way is more simple to add "watermrk" to more photos in simple way using a pre-saved setting.

Thanks in advance!

Bye.

title: 能不能添加一个【贴纸】预设功能
author: Anke9527
body: 每次添加同一个贴纸都需要重新选择，能不能有一个预设功能，保存当前的贴纸内容 位置 大小等，等下次再打开点击贴纸时先显示之前保存的几个预设贴纸，如果不想要在当前页面点击重新选择，再在相册中选择新的贴纸。

title: 能不能添加一个【贴纸】预设功能
author: Anke9527
body: 每次添加同一个贴纸都需要重新选择，能不能有一个预设功能，保存当前的贴纸内容 位置 大小等，等下次再打开点击贴纸时先显示之前保存的几个预设贴纸，如果不想要在当前页面点击重新选择，再在相册中选择新的贴纸。

title: 能否添加字体选择功能
author: diandianti
body:
如题，一些稀奇古怪的字体更难去除
如果有版权风险可以提示用户自行选择字体文件

title: 无法删除贴纸，只能重进软件
author: lanjiaolanjiao

title: Greyscale Support
author: gl-dev
body: Conversion from color to greyscale should be implemented to further reduce the chance of misusage of the watermarked picture/foto, without any need of other picture tools.

title: Screen orientation
author: gl-dev
body: If the OS supports turning the display e.g. upside down (rotate 180 or landscape mode 90/270), the app does not respect that, but stays in portrait mode.

title: 单图水印模式能加个居中么
author: sandmark78
body: 布局是否可以按照图片大小自适应底部居中吗？谢谢啦！

title: Screen protector
author: serrq
body:
Some apps give the ability (optional) to switch ON/OFF the "screenshot" and "recent apps" protection feature by other prying apps.
Basically a privacy feature. 

Here an implementation and some examples.

![1000108037](https://github.com/seemoo-lab/AirGuard/assets/113377431/15129f78-1ae2-4431-bb72-5ef60a454d6e)

![1000042036](https://github.com/horizontalsystems/unstoppable-wallet-android/assets/113377431/499a76af-6db7-4f6b-b886-f06ff7dad708)

title: UI issue
author: serrq

title: 在 一加 7T Pro上不能导出到相册
author: Cye3s
body:
一加 7T Pro 是 OxygenOS 12，已不能再更新，Android主版本为12。
软件是从GitHub下的最新版本，已也允许访问媒体文件，能选择图片。
但导出到相册时提示“获取权限失败”。

只能用触摸屏有一列失灵的一加 9 Pro 5G处理得到最后的图片，OxygenOS 14。
